creator: rodrigo@bebik.net
text:
Few days ago, was reported in the advocacy mailing list that the ISP and host company Verio, open a FreeBSd hosting platform.
Because Verio has a communication plan explaining why FreeBSD (optimum uptime, security,etc..) This news mus be part of the 'in the media' news.

http://www.verio.com/freebsd/
